title: Pagination returns wrong results — first page shows items starting from offset
description: The product listing pagination is broken. Page 1 skips the first N items (where N is the page size) and page 0 doesn't exist. Users never see the first page of products. The offset calculation in the pagination utility uses page * limit instead of (page - 1) * limit.
expected_behavior: Page 1 returns items 1-10, Page 2 returns items 11-20, etc.
actual_behavior: Page 1 returns items 11-20, Page 2 returns items 21-30 (off by one page)
recent_changes: Pagination was rewritten during the API standardization sprint
